ui.pageTitle: Aitebot | 爱特沃机器人俱乐部
ui.aboutP1: 爱特沃智能机器人实验室核心聚焦智能机器人、人工智能、低空经济三大核心领域，围绕硬件设计、嵌入式开发、算法控制、交互设计、视觉传达全技术栈开展技术攻关、创新实践与成果转化。
ui.aboutP2: 以"技术创新+场景落地+产业赋能"为核心逻辑，依托武汉理工大学科研平台、重点实验室与校企合作资源，打造集科研训练、技术研发、创业实践、产业落地于一体的科创平台。
ui.adv2Desc: 与中建三局科创、苏州仁帮集团等企业建立合作，打通技术研发与产业落地通道。
ui.adv3Desc: 覆盖硬件、软件、算法、设计、运营全链条，形成稳定的本硕研发团队。
ui.adv4Desc: 掌握硬件设计、嵌入式开发、算法控制、交互设计、视觉传达全技术栈。
ui.missionQuote: "基于高校平台快速产品迭代研发，链接企业资源走向市场完成商业闭环，打造中国硬科技创新创业的生力军。"
ui.contactDesc: 如果您对我们的项目感兴趣，或希望与我们开展合作，欢迎通过以下方式联系我们。
ui.contactAddress: 湖北省武汉市洪山区武汉理工大学
ui.footerCompany: 爱特沃智能机器人有限公司
ui.formThanks: 感谢您的提交，我们会尽快与您联系。
ui.loadErrorDesc: 请检查 public/content.json 是否存在

hero.title: 爱特沃机器人俱乐部
hero.subtitle: 技术创新 · 场景落地 · 产业赋能

projects.title: 筑墙智匠 Artwall v1.0
projects.description: 小型混凝土3D打印建筑机器人，利用数字孪生虚拟准轴技术实现无轨多机协同混凝土3D打印可进入绝大部分建筑开展施工，最高可打印3米高墙体。

projects.title: 智能农夫 Mr.handy
projects.description: 农业具身智能机器人，可进行农业巡检，作物采摘，病虫害防治，模块搭载多样，适用于多种农业场景

projects.title: 猫卡努
projects.description: AI仿生陪护机，集萌趣交互、智能陪伴、全屋远程视觉监控于一体的家用轻量化机器人。

projects.title: 智能图书管理机器人
projects.description: 具备错架图书检测、识别和整理功能，可精准定位错架书籍并通过机械臂取出归位。

projects.title: 洗衣机器手
projects.description: 洗衣烘干一体智能管理外接框架，实现对洗衣、烘干设备的统一接入与自动化控制。

news.title: 爱特沃实验室项目手册正式发布
news.summary: 实验室发布最新项目手册，全面介绍实验室定位、组织架构与在研项目情况。

news.title: 猫卡努AI仿生陪护机项目正式启动
news.summary: 依托武汉理工大学机电学院与艺设学院，打造高颜值、高智能的家庭智能终端产品。

news.title: Mr.handy家用机器人项目立项
news.summary: 瞄准具身智能风口，致力于打造武汉理工大学第一台全尺寸家用机器人。

ui.aboutP1: Aitebot Intelligent Robotics Lab focuses on intelligent robots, artificial intelligence, and the low-altitude economy. We advance R&D and commercialization across hardware design, embedded systems, control algorithms, interaction design, and visual communication.
ui.aboutP2: Guided by "technology innovation + real-world deployment + industry empowerment," we leverage Wuhan University of Technology research platforms, key labs, and industry partnerships to build a hub for research training, product development, entrepreneurship, and commercialization.
ui.adv2Desc: Partnering with CSCEC Third Bureau Sci-Tech, Suzhou Renbang Group, and others to connect R&D with industry deployment.
ui.adv3Desc: Covering hardware, software, algorithms, design, and operations—forming a stable undergraduate–graduate R&D team.
ui.adv4Desc: Mastering hardware design, embedded development, control algorithms, interaction design, and visual communication.
ui.missionQuote: "Rapid product iteration on a university platform, linking enterprise resources to close the commercial loop—building a new force for China’s hard-tech innovation."
ui.contactDesc: Interested in our projects or looking to collaborate? Reach out through the channels below.
ui.contactAddress: Wuhan University of Technology, Hongshan District, Wuhan, Hubei, China
ui.formThanks: Thanks for your message. We will get back to you soon.

projects.title: Artwall v1.0
projects.description: A compact concrete 3D-printing construction robot using digital-twin virtual axis tech for trackless multi-robot collaborative printing—works in most buildings and prints walls up to 3 meters high.

projects.title: Mr.handy Smart Farmer
projects.description: An agricultural embodied AI robot for field inspection, crop harvesting, and pest control—modular payloads for diverse farming scenarios.

projects.title: CatKanu
projects.description: An AI biomimetic companion robot combining playful interaction, smart companionship, and whole-home remote visual monitoring.

projects.title: Smart Library Robot
projects.description: Detects, identifies, and re-shelves misplaced books with precise localization and robotic arm retrieval.

projects.title: Laundry Robot Arm
projects.description: An external smart frame for washer–dryer systems, enabling unified access and automated control.

news.title: Aitebot Lab Project Handbook Released
news.summary: The lab released its latest project handbook covering positioning, organization, and active projects.

news.title: CatKanu AI Companion Robot Project Launched
news.summary: In collaboration with WUT’s School of Mechanical Engineering and School of Art & Design, building a stylish, intelligent home terminal.

news.title: Mr.handy Home Robot Project Approved
news.summary: Aiming at the embodied AI wave to build WUT’s first full-size home robot.
